record.field: Sales: Flag Kontrak yang Akan Expired

from datetime import date, timedelta today = date.today() threshold = today + timedelta(days=30) expiring = env['sale.order'].search([ ('state', '=', 'sale'), ('contract_type', '=', 'B2B_CONTRACT'), ('expiry_date', '!=', False), ('expiry_date', '<=', threshold), ('renewal_opportunity', '=', False), ]) expiring.write({'renewal_opportunity': True})
